---
title: "Programa de Prevención y Control de Arbovirosis | 2026 | Morelos"
format: 
  dashboard:
    nav-buttons: [twitter, github, facebook]
    logo: https://framework-gb.cdn.gob.mx/gobmx/img/logo_blanco.svg
theme: custom.scss
---

```{r setup}
library(sf)
library(magrittr)
library(mapgl)
load("/Users/fdzul/Documents/geocoding_mx_2026_dengue/4.RData/dengue_mx_2026.RData")
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_10_durango/mp_heatmap.R")
source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_10_durango/mp_transmission_chains.R")
library(fishualize)

source("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/r_developments/r_dashboards/netlify/1.2.persisten_dengue_transmission_2026/persistent_dengue_transmission_10_durango/mp_dengue_cases.R")
```


# [**Focos de Transmisión Activa**]{style="font-size:8pt"}

::: panel-tabset

### [**Cuernavaca**]{style="color:#990000"}
```{=html}
<style>
* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Contenedor principal con scroll - tres COLUMNAS */
.responsive-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;  /* Tres COLUMNAS iguales */
  gap: 25px;
  margin: 20px 0;
  max-height: 85vh;          /* Altura máxima para scroll */
  overflow-y: auto;          /* Scroll vertical */
  padding: 15px;
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background-color: #fafafa;
  align-items: start;
}

/* Cada columna es un contenedor flexible que apila sus elementos */
.columna {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 20px;
}

/* Título de columna */
.column-header {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 1rem;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 8px;
  background-color: #772953;
  color: white;
  border-radius: 6px;
  margin: 0;
}

/* Estilo para cada tarjeta de mapa */
.grid-card {
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  padding: 15px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: white;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
}

.grid-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

/* Asegura que los mapas tengan tamaño consistente */
.grid-card .html-widget,
.grid-card iframe {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 400px !important;
  border-radius: 8px;
}

/* Responsive: en móviles, una sola columna */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .responsive-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;  /* Una columna en móvil */
    max-height: 70vh;
    gap: 15px;
    padding: 10px;
  }
  .column-header {
    font-size: 1rem;
  }
  .grid-card .html-widget,
  .grid-card iframe {
    height: 300px !important;
  }
}
</style>
```
::::::::::::::::::::: responsive-grid

<div class="columna">
<div class="column-header"> Probables </div>

::: grid-card

```{r distribucion_cuarnavaca_p,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    #dplyr::filter(IDE_EDA_ANO <= 12 | IDE_EDA_ANO >= 65) |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
    mp_dengue_cases(yrs = 2026,
                    locality = c("Cuernavaca", 
                                 "Emiliano Zapata",
                                 "Jiutepec",
                                 "Xochitepec",
                                 "Temixco"),
                    cve_edo = "17")


```
:::

::: grid-card

```{r heatmap_cuernavaca_p,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    #dplyr::filter(IDE_EDA_ANO <= 12 | IDE_EDA_ANO >= 65) |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
    mp_heatmap(yrs = 2026,
                    locality = c("Cuernavaca", 
                                 "Emiliano Zapata",
                                 "Jiutepec",
                                 "Xochitepec",
                                 "Temixco"),
                    cve_edo = "17")


```
:::

::: grid-card

```{r chains_cuernavaca_p,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    #dplyr::filter(IDE_EDA_ANO <= 12 | IDE_EDA_ANO >= 65) |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
    mp_transmission_chains(yrs = 2026,
                    locality = c("Cuernavaca", 
                                 "Emiliano Zapata",
                                 "Jiutepec",
                                 "Xochitepec",
                                 "Temixco"),
                    cve_edo = "17")


```
:::



</div><div class="columna">
<div class="column-header"> Confirmados </div>

::: grid-card
```{r distribucion_cuernavaca_c,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    dplyr::filter(ESTATUS_CASO == 2) |>
    #dplyr::filter(IDE_EDA_ANO <= 12 | IDE_EDA_ANO >= 65) |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
  mp_heatmap(yrs = 2026,
           cve_edo = "17",
           locality = c("Cuernavaca", 
                                 "Emiliano Zapata",
                                 "Jiutepec",
                                 "Xochitepec",
                                 "Temixco"))

```
:::

::: grid-card
```{r heatmap_cuernavaca_c,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    dplyr::filter(ESTATUS_CASO == 2) |>
    #dplyr::filter(IDE_EDA_ANO <= 12 | IDE_EDA_ANO >= 65) |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
  mp_heatmap(yrs = 2026,
           cve_edo = "17",
           locality = c("Cuernavaca", 
                                 "Emiliano Zapata",
                                 "Jiutepec",
                                 "Xochitepec",
                                 "Temixco"))

```
:::

::: grid-card

:::


</div>
:::::::::::::::::::::

### [**Probables**]{style="color:#990000"}

```{=html}
<style>
* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Contenedor principal con scroll - tres COLUMNAS */
.responsive-grid2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;  /* Tres COLUMNAS iguales */
  gap: 25px;
  margin: 20px 0;
  max-height: 85vh;          /* Altura máxima para scroll */
  overflow-y: auto;          /* Scroll vertical */
  padding: 15px;
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background-color: #fafafa;
  align-items: start;
}

/* Cada columna es un contenedor flexible que apila sus elementos */
.columna {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 20px;
}

/* Título de columna */
.column-header {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 1rem;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 8px;
  background-color: #772953;
  color: white;
  border-radius: 6px;
  margin: 0;
}

/* Estilo para cada tarjeta de mapa */
.grid-card2 {
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  padding: 15px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: white;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
}

.grid-card2:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

/* Asegura que los mapas tengan tamaño consistente */
.grid-card2 .html-widget,
.grid-card2 iframe {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 400px !important;
  border-radius: 8px;
}

/* Responsive: en móviles, una sola columna */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .responsive-grid2 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;  /* Una columna en móvil */
    max-height: 70vh;
    gap: 15px;
    padding: 10px;
  }
  .column-header {
    font-size: 1rem;
  }
  .grid-card2 .html-widget,
  .grid-card2 iframe {
    height: 300px !important;
  }
}
</style>
```
::::::::::::::::::::: responsive-grid2

<div class="columna">
<div class="column-header"> Distribución de Casos </div>

::: grid-card2

```{r distribucion_zacatepec,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    #dplyr::filter(IDE_EDA_ANO <= 12 | IDE_EDA_ANO >= 65) |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
    mp_dengue_cases(yrs = 2026,
                    locality = "Zacatepec de Hidalgo",
                    cve_edo = "17")


```
:::

::: grid-card2

```{r distribucion_jojutla,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
    mp_dengue_cases(yrs = 2026,
                    locality = "Jujutla",
                    cve_edo = "17")


```
:::

::: grid-card2

```{r distribucion_cautla,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
    mp_dengue_cases(yrs = 2026,
                    locality = "Cautla",
                    cve_edo = "17")


```
:::

::: grid-card2

```{r distribucion_yautepec,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
    mp_dengue_cases(yrs = 2026,
                    locality = "Yautepec de Zaragoza",
                    cve_edo = "17")


```
:::



</div><div class="columna">
<div class="column-header"> Mapas de Calor</div>

::: grid-card2
```{r heatmap_zacatepec,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
  mp_heatmap(yrs = 2026,
           cve_edo = "17",
           locality = "Zacatepec de Hidalgo")

```
:::

::: grid-card2
```{r heatmap_jojutla,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
  mp_heatmap(yrs = 2026,
           cve_edo = "17",
           locality = "Jojutla")

```
:::

::: grid-card2
```{r heatmap_cuatla,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
  mp_heatmap(yrs = 2026,
           cve_edo = "17",
           locality = "Cuatla")

```
:::

::: grid-card2
```{r heatmap_yautepec,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
  mp_heatmap(yrs = 2026,
           cve_edo = "17",
           locality = "Yautepec de Zaragoza")

```
:::


</div><div class="columna">
<div class="column-header"> Cadenas de Transmisión</div>


::: grid-card2

```{r chains_zacatepec,echo=FALSE}
loc <- rgeomex::extract_locality(cve_edo = "17",
                                 locality = "Zacatepec de Hidalgo")
mapview::mapview(loc)

```
:::

::: grid-card2

```{r chains_jojutla,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    #dplyr::filter(IDE_EDA_ANO <= 12 | IDE_EDA_ANO >= 65) |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
    mp_transmission_chains(
                           yrs = 2026,
                           locality = "Jojutla",
                           cve_edo = "17")

```
:::

::: grid-card2

```{r chains_cuautla,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    #dplyr::filter(IDE_EDA_ANO <= 12 | IDE_EDA_ANO >= 65) |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
    mp_transmission_chains(
                           yrs = 2026,
                           locality = "Cuautla",
                           cve_edo = "17")
```
:::

::: grid-card2

```{r chains_yautepec,echo=FALSE}
z |>
    #dplyr::filter(IDE_EDA_ANO <= 12 | IDE_EDA_ANO >= 65) |>
    dplyr::mutate(onset = FEC_INI_SIGNOS_SINT) |>
    dplyr::select(ANO, long, lat, onset) |>
    dplyr::mutate(x = long,
                  y = lat) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"),
                 crs = 4326) |>
    mp_transmission_chains(
                           yrs = 2026,
                           locality = "Yautepec de Zaragoza",
                           cve_edo = "17")
```
:::


</div>
:::::::::::::::::::::

:::
